content.json:
## StratoSecure — Executive AppSec Risk Dashboard

Overall security posture, finding trends, compliance coverage, and SLA performance.

content.query:
StratoSecure_Findings_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize count() by Severity
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Finding Severity Distribution

content.query:
StratoSecure_Findings_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize AvgScore = avg(todouble(AppSecScore)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: AppSec Score Trend (30d)

content.query:
StratoSecure_Findings_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status == 'Open' and (Severity == 'Critical' or Severity == 'High') and AgeInDays > 7
| project FindingId, Title, Severity, AgeInDays, Application, OwnerEmail
| order by AgeInDays desc
| take 5
content.title: Top 5 Overdue Critical/High Findings

content.query:
StratoSecure_Findings_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Covered = countif(isnotempty(ComplianceTags)), Total = count() by Framework = extract('(PCI|CNBV|SBP)', 1, tostring(ComplianceTags))
| where isnotempty(Framework)
| extend CoveragePct = round(100.0 * Covered / Total, 1)
| project Framework, Covered, Total, CoveragePct
content.title: Compliance Coverage (PCI / CNBV / SBP)
